name: reference_v1
_doc: Full v1 (cli.py) parameter reference. Every knob set to its workshop default; runnable as a single-mode smoke test. The _comments block annotates each parameter — top-level _* keys are ignored by the validator. For ranges and citations see PARAMETERS.md.

_comments.diameter: Main lumen diameter [mm]. Workshop range 18-40. Default 24.
_comments.ascending_length: Ascending aorta length [mm]. Workshop range 30-60. Default 45.
_comments.arch_span: Arch horizontal extent ascending->descending [mm]. Workshop range 55-90. Default 70.
_comments.arch_height: Arch rise above ascending top [mm]. Workshop range 20-50. Default 35.
_comments.descending_length: Descending aorta length [mm]. Workshop range 60-250. Default 80.
_comments.branch_count: Number of supra-aortic branches (1, 2, or 3). Default 3.
_comments.branch_diameter_ratio: Branch diameter / main diameter. Workshop range 0.30-0.55. Default 0.42.
_comments.branch_length: Branch outlet extension length [mm]. Workshop range 20-60. Default 35.
_comments.branch_spacing: Spacing of branch origins along arch [mm]. Workshop range 8-20. Default 14.
_comments.branch_tilt_deg: Branch take-off tilt from +x toward +z [deg]. Workshop range 30-80. Default 60.
_comments.branch_splay_deg: Out-of-plane branch splay magnitude [deg]. Workshop range 0-40. Default 22.
_comments.coarctation_area_reduction: Area reduction at the throat (0 = healthy, 0.9 = critical). Default 0.65.
_comments.coarctation_length: Axial length of the smooth coarctation [mm]. Workshop range 10-40. Default 30.
_comments.coarctation_centre_fraction: Centre location along centreline arc [0-1]. Workshop range 0.5-0.9. Default 0.72.
_comments.proximal_hypoplasia: Smooth proximal arch diameter reduction [0-0.25]. Default 0.0.
_comments.roughness: Enable mild radial surface roughness. Default false.
_comments.noise_scale: Roughness spatial scale. Workshop range 0.05-0.5. Default 0.08.
_comments.segments_radial: Circumferential ring vertices. Workshop range 32-128. Default 64.
_comments.curve_samples: Main centreline sample count. Workshop range 100-400. Default 220.
_comments.cylinder_vertices: Cylinder vertices for branches. Workshop range 32-128. Default 64.
